_comment: LCSC part assignments for JLCPCB PCBA, keyed by KiCad footprint name (the 'Package' column of `kicad-cli pcb export pos`). Source of truth for assembly: lives here, not in the .kicad_pcb, so it survives Ergogen regeneration. scripts/gen-jlcpcb-bom-cpl.py joins this against the position file to emit BOM/CPL. Rules: a footprint NOT listed here is Do-Not-Place (MCU, TRRS, mounting holes, and the Kailh hotswap sockets - we hand-solder/insert those). A footprint listed with an empty `lcsc` is an error (BOM/CPL generation fails, writing nothing) until you fill it in. `rotation` is added to KiCad's rotation to correct for JLCPCB pick-and-place orientation; start at 0 and adjust after checking the DFM preview. NOTE: the Kailh hotswap sockets are hand-soldered (Do-Not-Place), not assembled by JLCPCB -- they are 0-stock for JLC assembly and Standard-only anyway. With them off the assembly BOM, every remaining placed part is Economic-PCBA-eligible, so the board can use JLCPCB's cheaper Economic service. VERIFY every `lcsc` is in-stock at https://jlcpcb.com/parts before ordering.

diode_tht_sod123.note: 1N4148W SOD-123 switching diode (ST/Semtech, JLC C81598). Confirmed in stock. Verify rotation matches diode polarity in DFM preview.

smd_805.note: 100ohm 0805 1% data-line series resistor (UNI-ROYAL 0805W8F1000T5E, JLC C17408). Confirmed JLCPCB Basic part.

D_SOD-123FL_HandSolder.note: Bidirectional 3.3V TVS, SOD-123FL. C782876 is the Leiditech SMF3.3CA equivalent, confirmed available for JLC SMT assembly (genuine Littelfuse is not stocked; ZHIDE C2917876 is an LCSC alternative). Bidirectional, so polarity/rotation is electrically irrelevant; set rotation so the body sits within the pads in DFM.

SW_TACT_ALPS_SKQGABE010.note: ALPS SKQGABE010 SMD tact switch (JLC C115351), genuine ALPS - exact match for this footprint. Note the config's reset silk label still reads TL3342F450QG (stale); the physical part is this ALPS SKQG.
